title: Group By <alias> not working
poc: select a as b from test group by b;
select count(*) as b from test group by b;
select coalesce(f1,'EMPTY') as bug_alias,sum(f2) from a group by bug_alias;
key_bug_features: Group By with alias not functioning correctly
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1(a int, b varchar(20));
INSERT INTO test1(a, b) VALUES (1, 'one'), (2, 'two'), (3, NULL);
SELECT a AS alias_a FROM test1 GROUP BY alias_a;
CREATE TABLE test2(c float, d int);
SELECT COALESCE(d, 0) AS alias_d, SUM(c) FROM test2 GROUP BY alias_d;
